content:
[Intro]
[ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Girl, sometimes it seems to me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
That I don't say the things I should[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
To you, I act like I'm no good[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
And you wait for me patiently[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
This house is not a home without you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
It takes two hearts to share[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Your eyes, will always see through me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
And bring me to my knees[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
And I, will always turn to you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
You're everything I need[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
And through the good and bad times[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
You have always been there[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
We hold each other close[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
You tell me it's alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
The nights we fight about it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Never dream of giving up[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E[/ch]
That's the price of love[/tab]


[Link]
[ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Love, sometimes it makes us cry[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
Forgive me when I get it wrong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
Sometimes it's hard to be that strong[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
And oh, I would do anything[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
For you I'd turn the stars around[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'd find a way somehow[/tab]
